Index

A D E M N S W 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

AlertSystem - Class in Unnamed Package
Manages notifications by delegating message delivery to a selected notification medium.
AlertSystem() - Constructor for class AlertSystem
Constructs an AlertSystem object with EmailService as the default notification medium.

D

Demo - Class in Unnamed Package
Demonstrates the functionality of the AlertSystem.
Demo() - Constructor for class Demo
Constructs a Demo object.
displayLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
Displays all notification messages stored in the log.

E

EmailService - Class in Unnamed Package
Sends notifications through an email service.
EmailService() - Constructor for class EmailService
Constructs an EmailService object.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Demo
Entry point of the notification system demonstration.

N

NotificationMedium - Interface in Unnamed Package
Defines a notification service capable of sending messages through a specific communication medium.
notifyUser(String) - Method in class AlertSystem
Sends a notification message using the currently selected notification medium and stores the message in the notification log.

S

send(String) - Method in class EmailService
Sends a message using the email notification service.
send(String) - Method in interface NotificationMedium
Sends a notification message using the implementing service.
send(String) - Method in class SMSService
Sends a message using the SMS notification service.
send(String) - Method in class WhatsAppService
Sends a notification message using the WhatsApp service.
setMedium(NotificationMedium) - Method in class AlertSystem
Changes the active notification medium.
SMSService - Class in Unnamed Package
Sends notifications through an SMS service.
SMSService() - Constructor for class SMSService
Constructs an SMSService object.

W

WhatsAppService - Class in Unnamed Package
Provides notification delivery through the WhatsApp service.
WhatsAppService() - Constructor for class WhatsAppService
Constructs a WhatsAppService object.
